name: Overpowered Isekai Journey
description:
You were accidentally killed by a higher entity, and so now, you get to choose 10 abilities and your own species in your next life in a fantasy world of swords and magic.

Ranks that go from K to EX, and even one final rank.

Levels on levels on levels. I won't get into the details, cause I want users to find out on their own, but here are some of the things you can learn about this bot before you use it:

3 Planes of existence layered on Infinite timelines, and infinite multiverses.

Mortal Plane- This is where you start after reincarnating. Plane of mortals.

Celestial Plane- Where you go upon achieving Celestialhood(Godhood), you'll enter as a God, Devil or Null, depending on the path you choose. Plane of Immortals.

Extradimensional Plane- Only those who have become truly powerful beyond understanding can enter it, the plane of Outer Gods.

A ranking system to match:

Ranks:

The ranks are: K<J<I<G<H<F<E<D<C<B<A<S<SS<SSS<EX

Those are the letter names of the ranks; they are also known as:

-Mortal tier: Basic(K rank), Intermediate(J rank), Advanced(I rank), Master(G rank), Grandmaster(H rank), Archmaster(F rank), Celestiality(E rank)

-Celestial tier: Demi Celestials(D rank), Semi Celestials(C rank), Celestial Noble(B rank), Celestial King(A rank), Celestial Emperor(S rank)

-Extradimensional tier: Dimensional Sovereign(SS rank), Conceptual Supreme Ruler(SSS rank), and Platonic Absolute Being(EX rank)

Magic system:

-Elemental magic:

•Central Basic Elements

-Fire

-Water

-Earth

-Air

-Light

-Darkness

-Positive

-Negative

-Neutral

•Derivative Basic Elements

>Duo Derivation

-Ice(Water/Air)

-Steam(Fire/Water)

-Ooze(Water/Darkness)

-Wood(Water/Earth)

-Magma(Earth/Fire)

-Sand(Earth/Air)

>Triple Derivation

-Heat(Fire/Air/Positive)

-Cold(Water/Air/Negative)

-Metal(Earth/Fire/Water)

-Salt(Earth/Air/Water)

>Quadruple Derivation

-Plant(Water/Earth/Air/Light)

-Lightning(Fire/Water/Air/Heat)

-Rubber(Water/Heat/Darkness/Air)

>Quintuple Derivation

-Snow(Water/Air/Earth/Cold/Light)

-Minerals(Earth/Air/Heat/Darkness/Fire)

-Wax(Plant/Heat/Darkness/Air/Water)

>Sextuple Derivation

-Clouds(Air/Water/Heat/Light/Fire/Cold)

-Smoke(Fire/Water/Darkness/Air/Earth/Heat)

>Septuple Derivation

-Dust(Earth/Air/Light/Water/Fire/Darkness/Positive)

-Ash(Fire/Earth/Air/Water/Light/Darkness/Negative)

Different paths to take for a godhood system:

Celestials can be classified into one of 6 main ways

The gods are beings who ascended on the basis of divine celestial energy. There are 3 main types of gods.
